objective.title: OBJECTIVE
objective.body1: You are a dictator. Survive all 10 days in power without losing the loyalty of the Military, the Business class, or the People — and without going bankrupt.
objective.body2: Let any faction's respect hit the floor, or let your treasury reach zero, and your reign ends early. Last all 10 days to win.

daily_loop.title: THE DAILY LOOP
daily_loop.body1: Each day runs for 2 real minutes (9:00 AM → 5:00 PM in-game). Before the clock runs out, take one action in each tab: Meet, Laws, and Deals. You can skip ahead early once you're done.
daily_loop.body2: When the day ends, taxes are collected and expenses are paid. The net result changes your treasury.

stats.title: STATS
stats.treasury_desc: Your money. Income comes from taxes; expenses come from public spending. Reaches $0 = game over.
stats.relations_desc: Each faction's loyalty, -10 to +10. Any one hitting the minimum ends the game.
stats.charisma_desc: Your personal influence, -10 to +10. Higher charisma improves your Dialogue success rate.

meet.title: MEET
meet.intro: Once per day, choose a faction and take one action:
meet.dialogue_desc: Free. A chance-based appeal. Higher charisma means better odds of gaining their respect.
meet.bribe_desc: Spend money to guarantee a relations boost. Costs vary by faction.
meet.expropriate_desc: Seize their assets for a cash injection. Relations will take a hit.
meet.eliminate_desc: Remove their representative permanently. High risk. Use sparingly.

budget.title: BUDGET
budget.intro: Adjust your tax rates and public spending from the Budget tab. Changes take effect at the end of each day.
budget.taxes_desc: 0–50%. Higher rates bring more income but erode faction loyalty over time.
budget.spending_desc: Spending levels 1–10. Higher spending costs more per day but earns goodwill.

laws.title: LAWS
laws.body: Each day a faction proposes a law. Approve it and they gain respect; reject it and they lose respect. Every faction can see what you decide — balance their needs carefully.

deals.title: DEALS
deals.body: A deal arrives each day from an interested party. Read the offer carefully — accepting or rejecting will have consequences. The outcome is revealed immediately after you decide.

tips.title: TIPS
tips.neglect_desc: It's easy to let one faction drift while managing the others. Check all three relations bars each day.
tips.clock_desc: The day ends automatically when time runs out. Make sure you've taken all three actions before then.
tips.treasury_desc: Keep some money in reserve. A deal or event can cost you unexpectedly — being broke leaves no options.
tips.charisma_desc: A positive charisma makes Dialogue reliable, saving you bribe money every round it works.
